name: status-report
description: Standalone HTML status report: highlights, in-progress work, blockers, steering metrics, and next-up items for a reporting period.

slots.description: Report title; used in <title> and the h1.
Small overline label above the title.
Reporting period, e.g. 'Week of YYYY-MM-DD — YYYY-MM-DD'.
The few things worth knowing; each item has a marker variant.
Active tasks with name, sub-note, progress percent, and owner.
Items needing help or a decision; each has a severity variant.
KPI cards with label, value, and optional week-over-week delta.
Planned tasks for the upcoming period with owner.
Footer provenance line, auto-filled by the agent.

shape.inProgress[]: { name: string, sub: string, progress: string|number, owner: string }
shape.blockers[]: { variant: enum[default,warn], title: string, owner: string, description: string }
shape.metrics[]: { label: string, value: string, delta: string, delta_dir: enum[up,down,none] }
